name: brightdata
description: A premium data reselling platform integrated with Bossu Data Hub API.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npx nodemon index.js" "cd webapp && npm run dev"
scripts.build:webapp: cd webapp && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../webapp && npm install
scripts.push: git add . && git commit -m "update" && git push
